title: Smoky Tangy Vietnamese Dark Chocolate Salad
description: A bright, nostalgic Vietnamese salad that blends smoky sea salt, tangy lime, and rich dark chocolate into a light yet indulgent dish.
instructions: In a heatproof bowl, melt the dark chocolate over a pot of simmering water or in a microwave in 30‑second intervals, stirring until smooth. Allow to cool slightly.
Whisk together fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, smoked sea salt, toasted sesame oil, and chili flakes until the sugar dissolves.
Fold the melted chocolate into the dressing until fully incorporated.
Toss the julienned carrot and cucumber in the dressing until each piece is coated.
Transfer the vegetables to a serving bowl and gently fold in the chopped mint and cilantro.
Sprinkle the crushed roasted peanuts over the top.
Let the salad rest for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve chilled or at room temperature, garnishing with extra mint if desired.
